contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Draft truesight.me blog post + infographic on Discovered Protocols methodology
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/54
  
  Details:
  Drafted the companion blog post to Kimi's Plug-and-play architecture post, framed as a methodology for protocol discovery and refinement (the 'process' counterpart to her 'shape'). Five-stage ladder (Sketch / Formalized / Indexed / Materialized / Authoritative) with forcing functions for each transition (usage frequency, side-effect needed, read frequency, non-obvious nuance). Concrete event distribution showing where TrueSight's events sit today. Original SVG infographic with vertical ladder + forcing-function arrows in the dark earth-tone palette matching Kimi's funnel SVG. Web3 placement as a single sentence, not a fight ('chain anchoring is an optimization layer, not the architecture itself'). Honest tradeoffs section named (latency, dedup-as-per-handler, schema evolution, read-side complexity). PR opened but not auto-merged — Gary should review the prose for tone/positioning before publishing publicly. Files: blog/posts/discovered-protocols-how-truesight-grows-its-dao-rules-through-use.html (~1500 words), assets/blog/discovered-protocols-ladder.svg, blog/index.html (card pinned above plug-and-play).
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
